summary: Added manifest novel-feature metadata, a phase5 proof marker, and a current Go toolchain pin for publish validation.
reason: The printed CLI was close to publishable but still lacked the proof and metadata that Printing Press publication enforces. These repo-local fixes make the generated tree satisfy the publish contract without changing the underlying product behavior.
validated_outcome: cli-printing-press publish validate --dir . --json returned passed=true after the manifest, phase5, and toolchain updates.
